name: Challenger Limited
analysis: CGF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$9.8100. Trade idea: entry A$9.8200, stop A$9.1179, target A$11.9263 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
